Title: Negative - Invalid Password
Preconditions: Invalid password (e.g., too short, too long, contains special characters)
Steps:
Enter invalid password: password1234
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid password.
Check for appropriate error handling.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid password.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Password complexity is critical; failure could compromise account security.

Title: Concurrent Login - Attempt to Login with Same Password
Preconditions: Multiple users attempting to login with the same password.
Steps:
Enter password: password123
Attempt to login with the same password as another user.
Verify the system prevents login and displays an error.
Check for appropriate error handling.
Expected Result: The system prevents login and displays an error message indicating duplicate password.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Potential for security vulnerabilities if duplicate passwords are not handled correctly.

Title: Positive - Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: Invalid email format (e.g., missing @ or domain)
Steps:
Enter invalid email address: test@example.com (missing @ or domain)
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.
Check for appropriate error handling.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Invalid email format could lead to security vulnerabilities or incorrect user data.

Title: Positive - Successful Login
Preconditions: User is valid, valid email and password.
Steps:
Enter valid email address: test@example.com
Enter valid password: password123
Click 'Login' button.
Verify successful login with user profile displayed.
Check for correct user profile displayed.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the user's dashboard.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Successful login is a core functionality; failure could lead to unauthorized access.

Title: Negative - Empty Email
Steps:
Enter empty email address:  
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating the email is required.
Check for appropriate error handling.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the email is required.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Missing email address is a critical requirement; failure could prevent login.

Title: Boundary - Minimum Password Length
Preconditions: Password length is less than 8 characters.
Steps:
Enter minimum password length: 6
Click 'Login' button.
Verify the login process is completed successfully.
Check for appropriate error handling.
Expected Result: Login proceeds successfully with the minimum password length.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Ensuring the system handles short passwords gracefully.

Title: Boundary - Maximum Password Length
Preconditions: Password length is greater than 32 characters.
Steps:
Enter maximum password length: 32
Click 'Login' button.
Verify the login process is completed successfully.
Check for appropriate error handling.
Expected Result: Login proceeds successfully with the maximum password length.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Ensuring the system handles long passwords gracefully.

Title: Edge Case - Invalid Email Domain
Steps:
Enter invalid email address: test@example.com (missing @)
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.
Check for appropriate error handling.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.
Custom (Risk Reasoning): Invalid email domain could lead to incorrect user data.
